name: JoAi: Update Element Variation

description.en: Update an element variation's label, aspect ratio, or spec overrides.
description.de: Aktualisiere das Label, das Seitenverhältnis oder die Spec-Überschreibungen einer Element-Variation.

bot: Use this when the user wants to relabel a variation or change its aspect ratio. Use list_element_variations first to find variation IDs.

inputs.name: Element ID

description.en: The ID of the parent element

inputs.bot: The element hash ID this variation belongs to.

inputs.name: Variation ID

description.en: The ID of the variation to update
description.de: Die ID der zu aktualisierenden Variation

inputs.bot: The variation hash ID. Use list_element_variations to find IDs.

inputs.name: Label
inputs.bot: An optional new label, e.g. 'Dark moody', 'Outdoor scene'.

inputs.name: Aspect Ratio
inputs.bot: Optional aspect ratio for the variation images.
